title: GoalBase
description: A generic Asana Resource, containing a globally unique identifier.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

html_notes.description: The notes of the goal with formatting as HTML.

notes.description: Free-form textual information associated with the goal (i.e. its description).

due_on.description: The localized day on which this goal is due. This takes a date with format `YYYY-MM-DD`.

start_on.description: The day on which work for this goal begins, or null if the goal has no start date. This takes a date with `YYYY-MM-DD` format, and cannot be set unless there is an accompanying due date.

is_workspace_level.description: *Conditional*. This property is only present when the `workspace` provided is an organization. Whether the goal belongs to the `workspace` (and is listed as part of the workspace’s goals) or not. If it isn’t a workspace-level goal, it is a team-level goal, and is associated with the goal’s team.

liked.description: True if the goal is liked by the authorized user, false if not.
